intent: Build a simple Python task management library (tasklib). It is not a production system. Its purpose is to validate that the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline can close a complete dependency chain — from documentation through scaffold to working code — with real merges at each step.
scope_statement:
Build a minimal Python task management library (tasklib) as defined in TRD-TASKLIB, consisting of a documentation set (README, ARCHITECTURE, API reference), a Python package scaffold under src/tasklib/ with models/ and storage/ subpackages, a Task dataclass with TaskStatus enumeration (FR-1 through FR-7), an InMemoryTaskStore (FR-8 through FR-14), a CLI entry point (FR-15 through FR-19), and a package root re-exporting the public API (FR-20). The purpose is to validate the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline's ability to close a complete dependency chain — docs → scaffold → model → storage → CLI — with real merges at each step.

prd_plan.title: Documentation Set: README, ARCHITECTURE, and API Reference
Package Scaffold: src/tasklib/ with models/ and storage/ Subpackages
Task Model: TaskStatus Enumeration and Task Dataclass (FR-1 through FR-7)
CLI Entry Point: add, list, and complete Commands (FR-15 through FR-19)
Package Root Public API Re-export (FR-20) and End-to-End Integration Validation
